title: EZ FPS And The Features For Pojav/Mojo
description: EZ FPS & Features enhances Minecraft performance with needed features, specially designed for PojavLauncher(Minecraft Java For Mobile Devices)
body:
# EZ FPS & Features For Pojav📱 🚀  
Tired of lag? Get smoother gameplay with **EZ FPS & Features**, designed for **low-end Phones Also For High-end Phones who want more fps:)**!  

## Plug & play — jump straight into PvP or survival with instant performance and pre-built resource packs.

### If Are You Are PC/Laptop/Desktop User Kindly Dont Use This One!!

**For PC/Laptop/Desktop Users [EZ FPS And Features For PC/Laptop/Desktop](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ezfps)**
## 🔥 Why Choose EZ FPS And Features For Pojav📱?  
- Based on **[Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)** & **[Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably)**  
- Perfect for **FPS boost pack**  
- Optimized settings for **maximum performance**  
- Includes **PvP-enhancing mods** for better gameplay  
- This Version Is Specialy Desgined For Pojav(Pojav Launcher is a playable minecraft launcher suitable for playing Minecraft on your phone)

## ⚡ Insane Performance Gains  
Tested on:  Redmi Note 7 Pro

📱 **Octa Core Max 2.02GHz CPU**  
🛠️ **4GB RAM Allocated Ram 1444mb**  
🎮 **ANDROID 10 - 2019**  
✅ **80+ FPS Achieved! Stable**  

⚡ **What are you waiting for? Download EZ FPS & Features for Pojav today!**

   ![EZ FPS POJAV](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a17a167d9a5d33230d457dedebbaef378dc95bc.jpeg)

 **1.2** 1.21.1 & **1.5** 1.21.1 (Kindly Select Latest/Biggest Value Of ModPack Version Than Minecraft Version 
1. Then Click At That Version Installed In Version Tab
2. Click At Pencil/EDit

3. Select Renderer To LTW OPEN GL ES 3 1.17+
   ![COPY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f20c2ff6bdf468e0ba8ba0a9be80116af4d3b17_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Is PojavLauncher legal and safe to use?</summary>

PojavLauncher is now legal in Microsoft’s eyes, even though it may not have been in the past. They ensure their launcher doesn’t support piracy and only provide support for those who already own the game.

PojavLauncher follows the Minecraft EULA by offering a free, open-source launcher that doesn’t share game files with other servers.

All authentication and downloads happen directly with Mojang’s servers. PojavLauncher doesn’t collect your information, login details, or data. Everything is stored on your device, where only you can access it.

- PojavLauncher is safe to use and doesn’t harm your device or distribute harmful programs.
  
- Please note, this can’t be guaranteed if you get PojavLauncher from unofficial sources.
  
- For iOS users: Jailbreaking can be a security risk, so be cautious if your device is jailbroken.
  
- Other apps claiming to be PojavLauncher for Minecraft: Java Edition on Android or iOS are not connected to the PojavLauncher team.
  
</details>
